about.name: Rakesh Sahu
about.title: Software Engineer
about.bio: Backend Engineer with 3+ years of experience specializing in Go, Node.js, and microservices architecture. Proven track record of migrating legacy monoliths to high-performance Go APIs and building robust backend systems for real-time applications. Experienced in streamlining CI/CD pipelines and implementing secure authentication flows to accelerate release velocity.

education.institution: Truba College of Science & Technology, Bhopal

projects.title: AI-Powered CI/CD Automation Pipeline
projects.description: Custom DevEx workflow that automates failed pipeline recovery, merge request commentary, and AI-assisted code review operations.

projects.title: Polyglot Chat Architecture
projects.description: Scaled a Node.js chat system with Go microservices, Redis Pub/Sub, and JWT-aware WebSocket message fan-out.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description:
Migrated legacy monolithic RESTful APIs from Laravel to Go, reducing average API response times by 80% and decreasing server resource consumption.
Integrated automated unit testing and linting into GitLab CI pipelines, preventing breaking changes from reaching production.
Replaced legacy session management with modern token-based authentication protocols, securing endpoints across the application.
Built a transactional email microservice capable of processing 1000 emails daily, facilitating reliable multi-module communication.

experience.title: MERN Stack Developer
experience.description:
Developed backend services using Node.js and Express to power a real-time chat application and HR payroll platform.
Implemented WebSocket connections to enable low-latency 1:1 and group messaging features, including typing indicators and read receipts.
Created secure authentication flows utilizing JWT and session-based strategies to enforce strict role-based access control for payroll systems.
Optimized file uploading and streaming endpoints, supporting the efficient transfer of high-resolution media with minimal latency.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.description:
Collaborated with the development team to contribute to designing and developing software applications like Hospital Management Systems (HMS), Food Ordering Apps, and Tech-Quiz Applications in Java.
Assisted in creating technical documentation in simpler ways for various technologies, including MERN (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js), Python, Spring and ReactJS.
